reforms.description: The 2016 investment law introduced state aid schemes aimed at attracting foreign direct investment (FDI) and encouraging innovative small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) through various financial incentives, including tax exemptions and fast-track licensing procedures.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The incentives are designed to stimulate investment and innovation, which can enhance productivity and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The investment law has been enacted and is currently in force.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant structural change in how Greece attracts investment and supports innovation.
reforms.source_quote: The 2016 law establishing state aid schemes for private investments introduced a range of financial incentives covering tangible and intangible capital.

reforms.description: Greece has implemented a new electronic system for establishing new companies and licensing through one-stop shops, simplifying administrative procedures and speeding up the registration process for newly founded companies.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By streamlining the registration process, the reform facilitates the establishment of new businesses, which can drive innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The electronic system is operational and being used for company registrations.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform significantly improves the business environment for startups, although it is not as transformative as major structural reforms.
reforms.source_quote: The electronic system for establishing new companies and licensing has been operational since June 2017.

reforms.description: Greece established the Hellenic Foundation for Research and Innovation (HFRI) in 2016 to enhance funding for research and innovation, modeled after successful institutions in other countries.
reforms.component_name: Hellenic Foundation for Research and Innovation
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By increasing funding for research and innovation, the reform aims to boost the overall R&D capacity and output of the country.
reforms.status_evidence: The foundation is operational and actively funding research projects.
reforms.importance_rationale: The establishment of HFRI represents a major structural change in the funding landscape for research in Greece.
reforms.source_quote: In 2016, Greece established a new science and research financing institution, the Hellenic Foundation for Research and Innovation (HFRI).

reforms.description: The National Strategic Plan for Research and Development 2014-2020 aims to promote links between research and industry, targeting an increase in gross expenditure on R&D to 1.2% of GDP by 2020.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By fostering collaboration between research and industry, the plan aims to enhance innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The plan is actively being executed with ongoing initiatives to increase R&D expenditure.
reforms.importance_rationale: The plan represents a significant commitment to enhancing R&D investment and collaboration in Greece.
reforms.source_quote: The National Strategic Plan for Research and Development 2014-2020 was introduced in 2014 as the successor of the National Strategic Plan for Research and Development 2007-13.

reforms.description: Greece has initiated the creation of the profession of patent attorney, which is expected to enhance the capacity of firms, especially SMEs, to file for patents, thereby improving the quantity and quality of patent applications.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By improving patent filing capabilities, the reform aims to enhance innovation output and protect intellectual property.
reforms.status_evidence: The initiative has been publicly announced but not yet implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: While beneficial, the reform is not as transformative as major funding or structural reforms.
reforms.source_quote: Recent important progress has involved the creation of the profession of patent attorney, which will extend considerably the pool of professionals who can represent clients filing for patents.

reforms.description: Greece is taking initial steps towards an action plan to support innovation through public procurement, including a pilot programme on Pre-commercial Procurement.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The action plan aims to leverage public procurement to stimulate innovation in the private sector.
reforms.status_evidence: The action plan has been publicly announced but not yet implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: While it represents a new approach to innovation support, it is still in the early stages of development.
reforms.source_quote: Greece is taking the first steps towards an action plan to support innovation through public procurement.

reforms.description: Greece is developing a National Transport Plan, scheduled for completion in March 2019, which aims to identify projects that achieve broad socio-economic goals and enhance public investment management.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The impact on growth is uncertain as it depends on the specific projects identified and their implementation.
reforms.status_evidence: The plan is under development and scheduled for completion.
reforms.importance_rationale: The plan represents a significant effort to enhance public investment management and socio-economic development.
reforms.source_quote: The Ministry of Transport and Infrastructure is co-ordinating the development of the National Transport Plan, which is scheduled to be finalised in March 2019.

reforms.description: Greece plans to consolidate agencies responsible for government-funded research to enhance the effectiveness of its innovation system.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Consolidating agencies is expected to streamline operations and improve the overall efficiency of the innovation system.
reforms.status_evidence: The plan for consolidation has been publicly announced but not yet implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: The consolidation represents a significant structural change in the governance of research funding.
reforms.source_quote: Building an innovations system involves consolidating agencies having responsibilities for government funded research.
